items.title: A survey of 1,000 hiring managers: 59% say they stress AI's role in layoffs or hiring freezes "because it plays better"; only 9% say AI has fully replaced roles (Gautam Mukunda/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: A survey of 1,000 hiring managers: 59% say they stress AI's role in layoffs or hiring freezes "because it plays better"; only 9% say AI has fully replaced roles (Gautam Mukunda/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: A survey of 1,000 hiring managers: 59% say they stress AI's role in layoffs or hiring freezes "because it plays better"; only 9% say AI has fully replaced roles (Gautam Mukunda/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 对 1,000 名招聘经理的调查显示：59% 的人表示他们强调人工智能在裁员或冻结招聘中的作用，“因为它发挥得更好”；只有 9% 的人表示人工智能已经完全取代了角色（Gautam Mukunda/Bloomberg）
items.title_bilingual: 对 1,000 名招聘经理的调查显示：59% 的人表示他们强调人工智能在裁员或冻结招聘中的作用，“因为它发挥得更好”；只有 9% 的人表示人工智能已经完全取代了角色（Gautam Mukunda/Bloomberg） / A survey of 1,000 hiring managers: 59% say they stress AI's role in layoffs or hiring freezes "because it plays better"; only 9% say AI has fully replaced roles (Gautam Mukunda/Bloomberg)

items.title: A US government website shows the Commerce Department withdrew a planned rule tightening AI chip exports; a draft was sent to agencies for feedback in February (Karen Freifeld/Reuters)

items.title_bilingual: 美国政府网站显示，商务部撤回了计划中的收紧人工智能芯片出口的规定；一份草案已于二月份发送给各机构征求反馈（Karen Freifeld/路透社） / A US government website shows the Commerce Department withdrew a planned rule tightening AI chip exports; a draft was sent to agencies for feedback in February (Karen Freifeld/Reuters)

items.title: Sources: Meta plans sweeping layoffs that could affect 20% or more of the company, amid mounting AI infrastructure costs; it had ~79,000 employees as of Dec. 31 (Reuters)
items.title_original: Sources: Meta plans sweeping layoffs that could affect 20% or more of the company, amid mounting AI infrastructure costs; it had ~79,000 employees as of Dec. 31 (Reuters)
items.title_en: Sources: Meta plans sweeping layoffs that could affect 20% or more of the company, amid mounting AI infrastructure costs; it had ~79,000 employees as of Dec. 31 (Reuters)
items.title_zh: 资料来源：由于人工智能基础设施成本不断上升，Meta 计划进行大规模裁员，这可能会影响公司 20% 或更多的员工；截至 12 月 31 日，该公司拥有约 79,000 名员工（路透社）
items.title_bilingual: 资料来源：由于人工智能基础设施成本不断上升，Meta 计划进行大规模裁员，这可能会影响公司 20% 或更多的员工；截至 12 月 31 日，该公司拥有约 79,000 名员工（路透社） / Sources: Meta plans sweeping layoffs that could affect 20% or more of the company, amid mounting AI infrastructure costs; it had ~79,000 employees as of Dec. 31 (Reuters)
